a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Gavi provides financial and expert knowledge support for countries to access new and underused vaccines.
Support is given to countries with a Gross National Income per capita of less than US$1,810, calculated using
the World Bank Atlas Method, over the past three years.
Data source: Global Alliance for Vaccines and Immunizations (2024)
